programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's finally time for Princess Aussie's singles match against WOW World Champion Abilene Maverick as the Australian tries to prove that she'll never give up chasing her dream.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Coach Campanelli addresses the fallout from last week's Trios Tournament Match, and Team Spirit's path forward as the tournament continues with Tormenta and Las Bandidas facing Team Exile in the next semi final match.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Fab Four are incensed to find out that because of their constant attacks on The Mother Truckers, David McLane has granted Big Rig Betty and Holly Swag a Main Event tag team match against Penelope Pink and Vickie Lynn McCoy.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jessie Jones and Amber O'Neal have a new look, but it's make or break for The All American Girls as they call their shot against them for the Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The VIP Abilene Maverick is firmly in The Beast's crosshairs as The Beast finally gets the rematch she's been waiting on for weeks, and a chance to reclaim the WOW World Championship that she never lost.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Beast demands justice after taking a loss in the WOW World Championship Match in the last episode of WOW.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Following the astonishing events of the Trios Tournament Finals last week, Coach Campanelli's newly formed Top Tier Team with herself, Kandi Krush and Gloria Glitter make their intentions crystal clear to the WOW roster.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: To prove that the members of Team Spirit are more than just benchwarmers, Ariel Sky challenges Top Tier to face Team Spirit head on in the Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After the truth about Abilene Maverick's injury is revealed, David McLane reminds her of her obligation to defend The WOW World Championship Title.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Abilene Maverick makes a special announcement that shakes the WOW roster to its core before The Beast wrestles "Best In Show" breed competition champion, Goldie Collins.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Miami's Sweet Heat: Laurie and Lindsey demand a title shot and call out The Mother Truckers to defend their gold in the Main Event. Ariel Sky fights for a way back into Coach Campanelli's good graces, but will Ariel's status as a wrestler be revoked?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jessie Jones proves she will go to any lengths to deter her former teammate the All American Girl, Americana, from success. Siren the Voodoo Doll is back!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Samantha Smart is seemingly willing to do anything to get her IQ Superior team of Classmaster and the Disciplinarian to the top as they make a challenge for the Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Boss Adriana Gambino makes her way to the ring in style to deal with Princess Aussie.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A reclusive old man with an Apache bodyguard is wanted for a crime committed long ago.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A ranch manager hires Randall to bring back a line rider charged with grand theft.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is rooked into advancing half the bounty to a man who promises to lead him to the wanted criminal Shawnee Bill, but Bill may be closer than Randall thinks.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A banker with a consuming thirst for vengeance hires Randall to accompany him to track down the man he believes responsible for his son's death and a bank robbery.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is deputized to transport a ruthless killer to Tucson but exchanges him for the nun kidnapped by the killer's gang.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall brings a suspected murderer to Pot Hole but fears the man won't receive a fair trial when he finds the townspeople in the grip of a power-mad bully.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When Josh, as a favor to a friend, escorts a beautiful woman to a trial that could see her hang for killing her husband, her lover, and a foreman, she charms him to convince her of her innocenences.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is asked by Stacy Torrance for help when she finds a wanted poster under her door - for her for murder.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Owing a favor to a sheriff, Josh agrees against better judgment to go to the lawless town of Bent Horn to bring back a man wanted for bank robbery and murder.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh sets out to help a heartbroken wife locate her missing husband, but his mission of mercy meets with a resistant and tight-lipped townspeople.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is bushwhacked by bounty hunters in cahoots with the local sheriff, who now must keep Josh from blowing the whistle on their illegal but lucrative \\"bounty game\\".

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A sadistic pair of killers escape from prison who have no qualms about killing.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Following an Indian attack on their stagecoach that kills his prisoner, Randall and an eastern gentleman unaccustomed to the ways of the West must trek to safety across many long, hot miles of hostile Apache territory.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: On Christmas, Eve Randall receives his most daunting assignment yet from a young boy who has eight cents to pay: bring in Santa Claus.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Thieves are lying in wait to ambush mail carriers and eventually Josh is hired to help ensure that the mail will get through.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is knocked out by a posse who wants his prisoner who is wanted for killing his step-daughter.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh needs to get his wounded prisoner to Bannach in three days to prevent an innocent man from hanging.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh rides into a small town looking for Vic Warsaw but is told by the Sheriff that Warsaw was buried that day and killed by Miss Lucy Fremont the night before.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Four men break out of prison looking for revenge against Aben Starr who turned them in after their first escape attempt.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is resting in Benson when two bounty hunters bring in a man - the mayor - dead.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A grieving father who is the town drunk hires Josh Randall with his last $30 to find his murdered son's body, but Josh's search for clues runs up against a cowardly conspiracy of silence.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: At the request of his friend's wife, Randall comes to assist and protect a war buddy in his bid for the town's mayoralty, quickly running afoul of the established political machine and its corrupt mayor and wanted sheriff.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A bounty hunter is not a hero in his own hometown, as Josh learns when he honors a dying friend's request to return his body to Cameron and the townspeople rush to judgment, believing Josh killed him for the reward money.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is approached by the wife of a wanted man eager to turn himself in peacefully, provided Josh splits the bounty with his wife.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A man with unwavering faith in a legend about lost treasure hires Josh to lead his family on an expedition into the desert to locate the cache of Spanish gold.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When a young runaway is framed for killing a Pinkerton agent, Randall turns detective to uncover the real killer.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is requested to meet a famous singer at the opera house in Denver who has a job for him.

channel.display-name: Warner Bros. TV Say Yes to the Dress

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: When Grammy-nominated rocker Elle King arrives, Randy and Shay have a dress disagreement; bride Lisa needs a gown for a wedding with dolphins.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Jamiee and fiancée Lisa are shopping together, and to keep the brides from seeing each other's looks, the consultants plan a wild surprise; wedding planner Michelle tries to let go and enjoy being the bride; Shay confronts Randy.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Randy's mom visits for her 93rd birthday, and she's happy to share her fiery opinions with everyone; timid bride Courtney's appointment gets hijacked by her provocative mother; Katie needs a gown suitable for two big secrets.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Bodybuilder Melissa needs a dress that shows off her muscles; Shay loses his cool with Randy as they help Kat, a bride with a tight budget;.Jasmine wants a unique bridal look to match her one-of-a-kind wedding on top of the Grand Canyon.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Bride Jennifer arrives at Kleinfeld with her fiancé and his wife; Glori only wants the trendiest of gowns straight off the runway; Amanda needs to leave with a dress today for her wedding inside a chapel made of ice.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Bodybuilder Melissa needs a dress that shows off her muscles; Shay loses his cool with Randy as they help Kat, a bride with a tight budget;.Jasmine wants a unique bridal look to match her one-of-a-kind wedding on top of the Grand Canyon.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Arlicia is letting her opinionated sisters plan her entire wedding, which includes choosing her dress; Ameena has an unlimited budget and bridezilla tendencies; Karen is especially thankful to be shopping after nearly losing her fiancé.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Bride Jennifer arrives at Kleinfeld with her fiancé and his wife; Glori only wants the trendiest of gowns straight off the runway; Amanda needs to leave with a dress today for her wedding inside a chapel made of ice.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: The entire Kleinfeld team comes together to help Emily, who needs a dress for her 10-year vow renewal atop the Empire State Building in two days; Olympian Queen Harrison faces new hurdles while deciding on her dream wedding gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Excitement is in the air at Kleinfeld because Randy is going back to his bridal design roots; "Flipping Out"'s Jenni Pulos has a huge surprise for her friend and nanny, Monica; bride Carly may be demanding, but Mother Nature rules all.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Twins Marlo and Margo return, with Marlo as the bride; in a cruel case of karma, Margo's sass comes out and family drama further escalates upon the revelation of a major secret; bride Val needs a gown for her icy wedding atop an Alaskan glacier.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Camila's desire to buy a black dress may push her equally fiery mother over the edge; after years working as Pnina Tornai's right-hand woman, Ally's gets her turn to be the bride, but a problem arises with her two custom gowns; extended.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Bride Courtney expects to look at every dress in Kleinfeld until she finds the perfect one; bride Brianna wants a dress inspired by the movie "50 Shades Freed"; bride Angela runs a circus, but doesn't want to look like a performer at the wedding.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Doga instructor Mariah looks for a princess dress and wants dog Coco to match; Jami is eloping to Paris and needs a dress as magical as her destination.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Dress shopping with Cat Cora ("Iron Chef") and her fiancee, Nicole Ehrlich; to keep things spicy the girls want to hide their final looks from one another with blindfolds; Rain needs a dress that fits inside one of Coney Island's scariest rides.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: It's sink or swim for Randy when Barbara Corcoran of "Shark Tank" comes to Kleinfeld; bride Bridgette needs a dress, and then immediately run in a Vegas half-marathon.

programme.title: Halloween Wars
programme.desc: The four remaining teams are challenged to create astonishing and delectable Halloween-themed displays showing that even the scariest monsters need friends, too; actress Katie Sarife joins the judges to pick the winning team.

programme.title: Halloween Wars
programme.desc: The three teams are tasked with creating stunning and scrumptious Halloween-themed displays showing the claustrophobic terror that results when someone is trapped with a monster; actress Jocelin Donahue joins the judges to choose the final two teams.

programme.title: Halloween Wars
programme.desc: In the final challenge, the team that best captures the terror and fun of the ultimate horror movie jump scare moment will be crowned the champions.

programme.title: Outrageous Pumpkins
programme.desc: Seven carvers must master the classic jack-o'-lantern; in the Quick Carve round, the competitors depict the struggle between good and evil; in the Big Carve round, each competitor is given one of the seven deadly sins to inspire their masterpiece.

programme.title: Outrageous Pumpkins
programme.desc: Six pumpkin carvers tackle 3D sculpting challenges, starting with science experiments gone wrong in the Quick Carve round; things heat up in the Big Carve round when the competitors incorporate fire in 3D dioramas of trick-or-treating pumpkins.

programme.title: Outrageous Pumpkins
programme.desc: Five expert pumpkin carvers face a spooky structures challenge; the carvers stack pumpkins to create undead animals in a pet cemetery-themed Quick Carve round before moving on to make enormous prehistoric creatures in the Big Carve round.

programme.title: Outrageous Pumpkins
programme.desc: The final four pumpkin carvers create terrifying monsters-in-law and larger-than-life monster party scenes using Atlantic Giant pumpkins; the winning carver will take home the $25,000 prize and bragging rights.

programme.title: Outrageous Pumpkins
programme.desc: Four of America's best pumpkin carvers come together for a Halloween pumpkin carving competition; in three rounds of challenges, the artists use carving and sculpting tools to execute their intricate designs, vying for a $10,000 prize.

programme.title: Halloween Cake-Off
programme.desc: The bakers design cakes with a dead-to-alive theme, mixing ingredients that are dead and dark with those that are alive and colorful; one competitor's cake is deemed dead on arrival; the remaining three bakers head home to create their showstoppers.

programme.title: Halloween Cake-Off
programme.desc: The four competing bakers must beware of evil spells as Duff Goldman provides cursed ingredients like blood oranges, black garlic and forbidden rice in the first round challenge.

programme.title: Halloween Cake-Off
programme.desc: A swarm of creepy crawlies is on the menu as Duff Goldman challenges the bakers to create cakes that have become infested and decayed.

programme.title: Halloween Cake-Off
programme.desc: Duff Goldman officiates the monster of all wedding cake competitions as the bakers create cakes fit for monstrous matrimony; following an elimination, the remaining three competitors return to their home bakeries to craft monster-sized cakes.

programme.title: Halloween Cake-Off
programme.desc: Duff Goldman welcomes talented bakers to an unconventional baking and design competition; in the first challenge, the four bakers must create Halloween-themed cakes that incorporate a surprise selection of candies and treats.

programme.title: Freakshow Cakes
programme.desc: Three teams of bakers create clown cakes that will haunt the dreams of kids and adults alike; in addition to the creep-out clown cakes, Vivian Chan and Zac Young challenge the bakers to create concession stand sideshow treats.

programme.title: Freakshow Cakes
programme.desc: Vivian Chan and Zac Young challenge the three teams of bakers to imagine a dangerous snake charming gone wrong; in addition, each team must bake a sideshow sweet treat with a surprise inside to complement their jaw-dropping snake cake.

programme.title: Freakshow Cakes
programme.desc: Three teams of bakers create mystical fortune teller cakes, but in this big top of horrors, the crystal ball only reveals tragedy and disaster; teams also create a shocking sideshow sweet to complement their main act.

programme.title: Freakshow Cakes
programme.desc: Three teams of bakers design smokin' hot cakes inspired by the infamous fire breather; Vivian Chan and Zac Young also challenge them to present a fiery sideshow sweet to go with their dangerous cake displays.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: In the first challenge, the bakers battle it out to create the best creepy cupcakes; the second challenge consists of classic costume desserts.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: The bakers spook the judges with their sculpted scary treats and then mash up flavors and themes to create devilishly delicious desserts.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Clay Hollister rides the stage to Laramie with a court order concerning a murder indictment against a man named Rowan. Clay finds that his fellow passengers include Rowan himself (under an alias) and a hired gun paid to kill the Sheriff.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Harvey Logan and his gunfighters take over the town of Sunglow and have themselves on a spree. Notified that the telegraph line to Sunglow is dead, Sheriff Hollister and editor Claibourne ride over to investigate and are trapped and thrown into jail.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister hears a distant shot but finds nothing to explain it. When Nancy Cooley arrives in Tombstone looking for her uncle who cannot be found, the sheriff solves the riddle of his disappearance and saves Nancy from becoming a gunman's victim.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: When a British writer arrives in Tombstone to gather material for a series about the American West, he tags along with Sheriff Hollister and a prisoner as they travel to Yuma prison. But the journalist is devising a dangerous plot.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: The great fire of 1881 nearly wiped out the town. As a result, Tombstone is in danger of losing its status as County Seat to nearby Benson, leading to a feud over the matter. Hollister's guns must right a wrong when fire mysteriously strikes again.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: A rancher hires a gunfighter (guest star James Coburn) to protect him from Jeff Harper, the last member of a family which has waged a feud with the rancher. Harper says he wants a truce with the rancher, but the hired gunfighter's trigger finger itches.

programme.title: Have Gun - Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin is hired to travel with adventurer Phileas Fogg during his 80 day trip around the world.

programme.title: Have Gun - Will Travel
programme.desc: After a man dies, the reading of his will causes three additional murders.

programme.title: Have Gun - Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin is hired by a man who has been wrongly accused of murder.

programme.title: Have Gun - Will Travel
programme.desc: A puppeteer gives Paladin a wagon ride to an Army fort commanded by a general with presidential aspirations.

programme.title: Have Gun - Will Travel
programme.desc: Coming off the trail, Paladin pulls into a mission seeking a night's rest and ends up helping a man.

programme.title: Have Gun - Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin arrives in the Texas border town of Jody with a murder suspect named Joselito Kincaid. Their appearance creates tension: this is cow country, and Kincaid is a sheepherder.

programme.title: Have Gun - Will Travel
programme.desc: When a group of men kill Paladin's prisoner, Paladin must bring the group of murders to justice.

programme.title: Have Gun - Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin is hired to find the princess of a tiny kingdom who disappeared while making a United States tour.

programme.title: Have Gun - Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin is hired by the wife of a man who's terrorized by his hometown. The Southerner is hated because of his role in the Lincoln assassination.

programme.title: Have Gun - Will Travel
programme.desc: The hunter becomes the hunted. When Paladin captures a former slave turned outlaw, a gang of rough bounty hunters fight to take his prisoner, dead or alive.
